# The Gateway Index

> The living index of LLM gateways, proxies & routers — the infrastructure that sits
> between apps and LLM providers — ranked daily by GitHub momentum.

Updated: 2026-06-30T12:21:44.602425+00:00
Tools indexed: 169

## Top LLM gateways, proxies & routers by momentum

- [BerriAI/litellm](https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm) — momentum 87, ⭐52110 — Gateways & Proxies — Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost
